zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Comyn於1289年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，她的父親Sir Alexander Comyn28歲，母親Joan Latimer30歲。她於1310年7月14日與Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年7月3日在英國萊希斯特斯爾特維其可享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾笛卡爾 迪爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Comyn于1289年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Comyn28岁，母亲Joan Latimer30岁。她于1310年7月14日与Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年7月3日在英国萊希斯特斯爾特維其可享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾笛卡爾 迪爾。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Comyn was born in 1289, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander Comyn, was 28 and her mother, Joan Latimer, was 30. She married Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris on 14 July 1310, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 3 July 1349, in Whitwick, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Comyn est née en 1289, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Comyn, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Latimer, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris le 14 juillet 1310, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1349, à Whitwick, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Comyn 1289 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Comyn 28 und ihre Mutter Joan Latimer 30. Sie hat am 14. Juli 1310 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juli 1349 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Whitwick, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Comyn è nata il nel 1289 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander Comyn, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joan Latimer, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris il 14 luglio 1310, nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1349, nel Whitwick, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Comynが1289年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Comynは28歳，母Joan Latimerは30歳であった。1310年7月14日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンでHenry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxorisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年7月3日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウィトウィックで60歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアオルド ディールにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Comyn(이)가 1289년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Comyn(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Latimer(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1310년 7월 14일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 7월 3일 영국 레이스스터실르 휘트윅에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르 드 디어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Comyn nasceu em 1289, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Comyn, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Latimer, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris em 14 de julho de 1310, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de julho de 1349, em Whitwick, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Comyn родилась в 1289 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Comyn было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Latimer, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris 14 июля 1310 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 3 июля 1349 г. в местности уитвикк, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности олд дир, абирдиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Comyn nació en 1289, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Comyn, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Latimer, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris el 14 de julio de 1310, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1349, en Whitwick, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
